data.source: OpenChargeMap API daily charger count growth across US networks

behavior: EV charger installation rates spike quarterly when federal or state incentive windows open, signaling infrastructure investment demand and energy sector capex momentum.

market_impact.rationale: EV charging infrastructure expansion directly correlates with energy transition capex and utility modernization demand.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly charger count growth exceeds 3-month rolling average by 40% or more
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when growth falls back to 3-month average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Charger deployment cycles are predictable and tied to incentive program rollouts; growth surges occur 2-4 times per year.

data.source: USGS Earthquake Activity API daily magnitude 3.0+ events by region

behavior: Clusters of seismic activity in populated areas trigger insurance claim inquiry spikes and reinforce re-insurance pricing pressure, shifting capital to insurers and risk management firms.

market_impact.rationale: Earthquake swarms increase insurance underwriting activity, loss reserve adjustments, and reinsurance demand.

trade_logic.entry: When a region records 5+ magnitude 3.0+ earthquakes within 7 days
trade_logic.exit: After 8 trading days or when seismic activity drops to <2 events per week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic clusters occur regularly; US averages 1-2 significant swarms per month in active zones.

data.source: FRED Cass Freight Index (CASS) weekly levels via fred_series adapter

behavior: When freight rate volatility (rolling 4-week standard deviation) expands beyond 2-sigma above 12-month mean, it signals supply chain chaos that pressures industrial inputs but lifts logistics and rail operators.

market_impact.rationale: Elevated freight volatility boosts pricing power for transportation and logistics firms while signaling demand uncertainty.

trade_logic.entry: When 4-week freight rate volatility exceeds 12-month mean + 2 standard deviations
trade_logic.exit: After 6 trading days or when volatility reverts below mean + 1.5 sigma

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight volatility expands 2-3 times per month during seasonal demand swings or supply shocks.

data.source: Open-Meteo daily temperature and humidity for US grid zones

behavior: Extreme temperature deviations (>3 sigma from 30-year normal) drive utility peak demand and grid stress, lifting wholesale power prices and utility margins.

market_impact.rationale: Extreme weather increases peak load, emergency demand response costs, and pricing power for utilities.

trade_logic.entry: When area-weighted US temperature deviation exceeds 3 sigma from historical norm for that date
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or when temperature normalizes to within 1.5 sigma

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Extreme weather events occur weekly during peak summer/winter seasons; several per month year-round.

idea: Manufacturing Job Posting Surge Rebound Trade

data.source: Indeed.com job posting counts via html_table scrape, manufacturing category weekly

behavior: When manufacturing job postings spike 25%+ week-over-week, it signals capital equipment orders and production ramp expectations 4-6 weeks ahead.

market_impact.rationale: Manufacturing hiring surges precede earnings beats and capex announcements in industrial and materials sectors.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly manufacturing job postings exceed prior week by 25% or more
trade_logic.exit: After 15 trading days or when postings drop 15% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Manufacturing job posting volatility is seasonal; 3-4 spikes per year as factories ramp for demand cycles.

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'last minute hotel deals' and 'flight price alerts'

behavior: When last-minute travel search interest exceeds early-booking interest by >20%, it signals price-sensitive consumer behavior and margin compression in hospitality and airlines.

market_impact.rationale: Last-minute booking spikes indicate weak demand visibility and pricing power erosion in leisure and hospitality.

trade_logic.entry: When last-minute travel searches exceed advance-booking searches by 20% over 2-week window
trade_logic.exit: After 8 trading days or when booking pattern normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel search seasonality creates regular booking pattern divergences; occurs 2-3 times per month.

data.source: Google Trends weekly searches for 'high deductible health plan' and 'medical bill payment plans'

behavior: Spikes in insurance deductible and medical billing searches, especially in January and post-open enrollment, signal consumer health cost stress and reduced discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Rising health cost anxiety compresses consumer discretionary budgets and spending confidence.

trade_logic.entry: When combined search volume for deductible/payment plan searches exceeds 8-week average by 35%
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when searches fall below 1.5x baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Health cost searches spike predictably post-enrollment and at fiscal year boundaries; 2-3 spikes per year minimum.

idea: Small Cap Value Dividend Yield Compression Fade

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily price and dividend data for IWN (Russell 2000 Value) via price_only adapter

behavior: When IWN dividend yield compresses by 15%+ from 12-month high in a 10-day window, it signals overheating rotation out of value into momentum that typically mean-reverts within 2-3 weeks.

market_impact.rationale: Value yield compression followed by mean reversion creates tactical long opportunities in financials and small-cap industrial leaders.

trade_logic.entry: When IWN dividend yield drops 15% from 12-month rolling high within 10 days
trade_logic.exit: After 12 trading days or when yield rebounds to within 10% of previous peak

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Dividend yield volatility in small-cap value is common; compressions occur 1-2 times per month in normal markets.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily returns for XLP and SPY via price_only adapter

behavior: When XLP underperforms SPY by 2%+ over 7 trading days while VIX remains <20, it signals defensive crowding followed by tactical rotation back to beaten-down risk assets.

market_impact.rationale: Staples underperformance in low-VIX environments typically reverts as risk appetite returns.

trade_logic.entry: If XLP lags SPY by >2% over 7 days AND VIX <20 AND XLP shows intra-day bounce
trade_logic.exit: After 6 trading days or when XLP outperforms SPY over 2 consecutive days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Staples/market relative weakness occurs in 40% of rolling 7-day windows; frequent tactical reversal opportunity.

idea: Renewable Energy RSS News Volume Surge

data.source: RSS/news feed counts for clean energy, solar, and wind keywords via rss_count adapter, weekly aggregation

behavior: When weekly renewable energy news story counts spike 50%+ above 12-week moving average, it correlates with policy announcements, funding approvals, and sector rotation momentum.

market_impact.rationale: Renewable energy news volume spikes often precede clean tech capex cycles and utility renewable procurement announcements.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly clean energy RSS count exceeds 12-week average by 50% or more
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when story count reverts to baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Renewable energy news volume is volatile and tied to policy cycles; spikes occur 2-4 times per quarter.
